ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sample */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the sample */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the reference point (in meters) */,
  "ch4" REAL /* Methane concentration (CH4) in parts per million (ppm) */,
  "tw" REAL /* Water temperature (Tw) in degrees Celsius */,
  "pch4atm" REAL /* Atmospheric methane concentration (pCH4atm) in parts per million (ppm) */,
  "u10" REAL /* Wind speed (U10) in meters per second (m/s) */,
  "fa" REAL /* Methane flux (Fa) in milligrams per square meter per day (mg/m²/day) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the sample */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "setup_date" TEXT /* Date the site was set up */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., CH4, Tw, pCH4atm, U10, Fa) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Calibration frequency in days */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the sensor is deployed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was deployed */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was decommissioned (if applicable) */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the deployment */,
  "maintenance_log" TEXT /* Log of maintenance activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data stream */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor generating the data */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the data stream */,
  "stream_description" TEXT /* Description of the data stream */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the data stream started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the data stream ended (if applicable) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data stream (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_streams_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data stream the record belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data record */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data record */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data value */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Additional flags or metadata about the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES data_streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregations" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data aggregation */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data stream the aggregation belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the aggregation period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the aggregation period */,
  "aggregation_type" TEXT /* Type of aggregation (e.g., daily, hourly, monthly) */,
  "value" REAL /* Aggregated value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the aggregated value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for aggregation (e.g., mean, median, sum) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the aggregation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES data_streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field technician, data analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., sample, site, sensor) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assurance" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assurance record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being quality assured */,
  "qa_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality assurance was performed */,
  "qa_type" TEXT /* Type of quality assurance (e.g., calibration, validation) */,
  "qa_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality assurance (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "qa_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the quality assurance process */,
  "qa_performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the quality assurance */,
  "qa_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality assurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assurance_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the data model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the data model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model generating the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value (if available) */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES data_models ("model_id")
)
